jsonLd.title: SIDBI is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at SIDBI are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SIDBI:
SIDBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SIDBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
